programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 2.8m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 11.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 25.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.6m @ 14s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
At 2.6 meters and with offshore wind, it'll be alright, provided you like getting pitched.
🌊 Swell: 2.6m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 17.0km/h NNE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 29.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 17.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m
